scenario: A malformed installation configuration value reaches validateConfig as undefined and causes an unstructured TypeError instead of a bounded validation result.
decisionRationale: The scenario affected availability only for a direct malformed pre-v1 library call, exposed no tenant data or authority boundary, and had no supported registry release requiring coordinated downstream remediation. The public synthetic fix still required a regression test and full security review.
remainingLimitations: No GitHub private advisory or private fork was created because this was a public synthetic tabletop.
No external reporter communication or embargo coordination was exercised.
The external or structured community security review required by Issue #32 remains incomplete.
